content.explanation:
**Could — Past Ability & Polite Requests:**

"Could" के 3 main uses:

**Use 1: Past Ability** (past form of "can")
🇮🇳 मैं बचपन में बहुत तेज़ दौड़ सकता था।
🇬🇧 I **could** run very fast as a child.

**Use 2: Polite Request** (more polite than "can")
🇮🇳 क्या आप मेरी मदद कर सकते हैं? (polite)
🇬🇧 **Could** you help me please?

**Use 3: Possibility** (less certain than "may")
🇮🇳 वह शायद late हो सकता है।
🇬🇧 He **could** be late.
rules: Could = past tense of can (for past ability)
All subjects: I/He/She/We/They + could + base verb
Polite request: Could you...? (more polite than Can you?)
Possibility: It could happen. (less certain than may)
Could have + V3 = past possibility/missed opportunity
Conditional: If I had time, I could help you.
content.memoryTrick: **COULD = Can का Past + Politeness Upgrade** — Past ability = "I could fly kites." Request = "Could you help?" — More polite than "can"!

examples.hindi: मैं बचपन में तैर सकता था।
examples.english: I could swim as a child.

examples.hindi: क्या आप थोड़ा और ज़ोर से बोल सकते हैं?
examples.english: Could you speak a bit louder?

examples.hindi: वह पहले 5 भाषाएँ बोल सकती थी।
क्या आप मुझे रास्ता बता सकते हैं?
examples.english: Could you tell me the way?

examples.hindi: यह आसानी से हो सकता है।

speakingTips: Requests के लिए: 'Could you please send me the report?'
Past ability stories: 'When I was young, I could...'
'Could' से interview में impress करो: 'Could I ask a question?'

vocabulary.example: She was capable of great things.
You could reach your full potential.
He could have been a great singer.
I could have used this opportunity.
He regrets he could not attend.

practice.hindi: जब मैं छोटा था, तो बहुत तेज़ दौड़ सकता था।
practice.english: When I was young, I could run very fast.
alternatives: i could run very fast when i was young.

practice.hindi: वह बचपन में बहुत अच्छा गाना गा सकती थी।
practice.english: She could sing very well in childhood.
alternatives: she used to sing very well as a child.

practice.hindi: क्या आप please थोड़ा और explain कर सकते हैं?
practice.english: Could you please explain a little more?
alternatives: could you elaborate a little?

practice.hindi: वह पहले 6 languages बोल सकता था।
practice.english: He could speak 6 languages before.
alternatives: he used to speak six languages.

practice.hindi: क्या तुम कल meeting में आ सकते हो?
practice.english: Could you come to the meeting tomorrow?
alternatives: would you be able to attend the meeting tomorrow?

practice.hindi: पहले वह बहुत देर तक बैठकर पढ़ सकती थी।
practice.english: She could sit and study for a long time before.
alternatives: she used to study for hours.

practice.hindi: क्या मैं आपकी pen use कर सकता हूँ?
practice.english: Could I use your pen?
alternatives: may i use your pen?

practice.hindi: वे पहले बिना glasses के पढ़ सकते थे।
practice.english: They could read without glasses before.
alternatives: they used to read without glasses.

practice.hindi: जब मैं student था, रात को 2 बजे तक पढ़ सकता था।
practice.english: When I was a student, I could study till 2 AM.
alternatives: i used to study till 2 am as a student.

practice.hindi: क्या आप please document email कर सकते हैं?
practice.english: Could you please email the document?
alternatives: could you send me the document by email?

practice.hindi: वह पहले piano बहुत अच्छे से बजा सकती थी।
practice.english: She could play the piano very well before.
alternatives: she used to play the piano beautifully.

practice.hindi: क्या आप मुझे station का रास्ता बता सकते हैं?
practice.english: Could you tell me the way to the station?
alternatives: could you direct me to the station?

practice.hindi: उसने कहा कि वह समझ नहीं सका।
practice.english: He said that he could not understand.
alternatives: he said he couldn't understand.

practice.hindi: क्या तुम please volume थोड़ा कम कर सकते हो?
practice.english: Could you please turn down the volume a little?
alternatives: could you lower the volume please?

practice.hindi: जब वह बच्चा था, 5 घंटे cricket खेल सकता था।
practice.english: When he was a child, he could play cricket for 5 hours.
alternatives: he used to play cricket for hours as a child.

practice.hindi: क्या मैं कल छुट्टी ले सकता हूँ?
practice.english: Could I take a day off tomorrow?
alternatives: may i have a day off tomorrow?
practice.hint: Could I + take a day off?

practice.hindi: पहले वह बिना किसी help के सब कुछ कर सकती थी।
practice.english: She could do everything without any help before.
alternatives: she used to manage everything on her own.

practice.hindi: उस समय वह बहुत अच्छे decision ले सकता था।
practice.english: At that time, he could make very good decisions.
alternatives: he used to make great decisions back then.

practice.hindi: क्या आप please meeting reschedule कर सकते हैं?
practice.english: Could you please reschedule the meeting?
alternatives: would you be able to reschedule the meeting?

practice.hindi: शुरू में मैं कुछ भी नहीं बोल सकता था।
practice.english: In the beginning, I could not speak anything.
alternatives: in the beginning, i couldn't say anything.

practice.hindi: क्या आप कल 5 बजे free हो सकते हैं?
practice.english: Could you be free at 5 tomorrow?
alternatives: would you be available at 5 tomorrow?

practice.hindi: वह बचपन में पाँच languages में लिख सकती थी।
practice.english: She could write in five languages as a child.
alternatives: she used to write in five languages as a child.

practice.hindi: क्या कोई मेरी help कर सकता है?
practice.english: Could someone help me?
alternatives: can anyone help me?

practice.hindi: मैं पहले बहुत तेज़ type कर सकता था।
practice.english: I could type very fast before.
alternatives: i used to type very quickly.

practice.hindi: क्या तुम please इसे दूसरे तरीके से समझा सकते हो?
practice.english: Could you please explain this in a different way?
alternatives: could you try explaining this differently?

practice.hindi: वह तीन साल की उम्र में पढ़ सकती थी।
practice.english: She could read at the age of three.
alternatives: she was able to read at three years old.
practice.hint: could + read + at the age of

practice.hindi: क्या हम इस project पर collaborate कर सकते हैं?
practice.english: Could we collaborate on this project?
alternatives: would we be able to work together on this project?

practice.hindi: पहले वे बिना plan के भी manage कर सकते थे।
practice.english: Before, they could manage even without a plan.
alternatives: they used to cope without a plan.

practice.hindi: क्या तुम मेरे लिए एक email draft कर सकते हो?
practice.english: Could you draft an email for me?
alternatives: could you write an email on my behalf?

practice.hindi: जब वह college में था, रात भर study कर सकता था।
practice.english: When he was in college, he could study all night.
alternatives: he used to study through the night in college.
